spec_trace.roadmap_pointer: Handshake_Master_Spec_v02.144.md 7.6.3 (Phase 1) -> [ADD v02.144] Second-pass feature-family coverage / coverage sweep

draft_scope.intent:
- What: Backfill Canvas as a governed runtime surface with explicit job/workflow/tool-call visibility, provenance, and operator projection.
- Why: Canvas is central to Thinking Pipeline and Studio, but appendix coverage is still too thin for deterministic future tool/runtime use.
draft_scope.scope_sketch:
- IN_SCOPE:
  - Canvas runtime identity across jobs and governed edits.
  - DCC / Flight Recorder / Locus visibility for canvas-originated actions.
- OUT_OF_SCOPE:
  - Final visual polish.
  - New creative features outside runtime visibility.
draft_scope.acceptance_criteria:
- Canvas has explicit runtime and operator visibility mapping.
- UI controls enumerate handoff and trace inspection flows.
draft_scope.risks_unknowns: - Risk: Canvas remains a visually rich but runtime-opaque island if not backfilled now.

assumptions_to_attack: A stub is planning metadata, not execution authority.
Stub Markdown may contain stale draft scope until activated through a signed packet.
Apps must not treat stub contracts as runnable work packets.
minimum_controls: Require official packet contract before Coder or Validator launch.
Fail drift checks when stub Markdown changes without contract regeneration.
